summary: Set 7 Session 3 (final): bootstrap, docs, cross-provider review. Updated the Generate Session-Set Prompt template (sessionGenPrompt.ts) to instruct the AI to create session-state.json with status:not-started alongside spec.md. Added a new Session-Set Lifecycle and State File section to docs/ai-led-session-workflow.md documenting canonical status values, the file-presence invariant, and the lazy-synthesis fallback. Extended docs/session-state-schema-example.md to document the not-started and in-progress shapes (the .json file remains the closed shape). Replaced the file-presence state-detection table in the extension README with a status-driven table plus a legacy fallback note. Build passed: pytest 647 passed, schema drift check clean, tsc clean, vsce package builds. Cross-provider verification ran on GPT-5.4; two findings (session-003.md self-reference and pre-existing vscode-test launcher infra failure) were surfaced to the human and adjudicated as accept-dismissal via record_adjudication. Note: ai-assignment.md was not authored this set (Step 3.5 / Rule #17) because the user has restricted ai-router usage to end-of-session verification only for cost containment.
